observed_truth_rule: Only Pass B human-observed claims may be scored as gold.

google-consumer-2026-07-15.note: Project owner approved this bounded use because the dataset evaluates provider systems for an inventory task and does not train, fine-tune, distil, or otherwise develop model weights. Re-check before any training use or publication-scope change.

openai-eu-2026-07-15.note: Prompt and VLM evaluation only; no weight training. Re-check if use or publication scope changes.

design_change.reason: Restore the intended 50/50 Nano Banana 2 Lite and GPT Image 2 split after clarifying that Antigravity supplies only the Google half.
design_change.effect: Eight Nano Banana 2 Lite attempts and eight GPT Image 2 attempts; a 75% accepted-generation yield is sufficient to continue, while failed images remain excluded from scoring.
